title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Citigroup is seeking a Supply Chain Analyst to optimize our procurement and logistics operations from our Raleigh location. You'll analyze supply chain metrics, identify cost savings, and support vendor management. This hybrid role combines financial analysis with operational excellence.
responsibilities: Analyze supply chain metrics and KPIs; identify opportunities for cost reduction and efficiency gains
Support procurement processes; evaluate vendor performance and manage supplier relationships
Prepare reports and dashboards on supply chain performance for management review
Collaborate with procurement and operations teams to optimize sourcing strategies
Track inventory levels and demand forecasting; make recommendations to reduce excess inventory

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Supply Chain Management, or related field
